summary: Iteration 21 testing complete. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Academy drill-down with 3 sub-tabs (Ρόστερ, Αγώνες, Γκαλερί), player form with parent contact fields, transfer modal with multi-group selection, and public player profile with academy breadcrumb.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed players created during testing and cleaned up. Academy groups U12, U7, U9 exist with test players.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested Academy Player Management features. Key findings: 1) Admin login works at /admin/login with credentials 'Lefteria FC' / 'L3ft3r1@FC#2024$Secure!'. 2) ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ > Ομάδες shows 3 academy groups (U12, U7, U9) with player counts. 3) Clicking a group card opens drill-down view with 3 sub-tabs: Ρόστερ (roster), Αγώνες (fixtures), Γκαλερί (gallery). 4) Roster tab shows players with columns: #, image, Όνομα, Θέση, Ηλικία, Γονέας, Τηλ., actions. 5) '+ Νέος Παίκτης' button opens player form with: name, number, DOB (auto-age calc), position, nationality, height, weight, photo upload, parent name/phone/email, bio. 6) Transfer button opens modal with multi-group checkboxes (U12, U7, U9). 7) POST /api/admin/players/{id}/transfer accepts {group_ids: [...], primary_group_id: '...'}. 8) Αγώνες tab shows empty state with '+ Νέος Αγώνας' button. 9) POST /api/admin/academy-groups/{group_id}/fixtures creates academy fixtures. 10) Public player profile at /player/{id} shows breadcrumb 'Αρχική > Ακαδημία > Player Name' for academy players. 11) Player model includes parent_name, parent_phone, parent_email, academy_group_ids fields.

bug_fixed.fix: Changed line 952 in server.py to extract fixture data first, then override academy_group_id
